description.name: AtomFleet Proxmox
description.tagline: Proxmox provisioning module for WHMCS with D3.js dashboards and automated IPv4 pool allocation.
description.long: AtomFleet Proxmox provisions QEMU and LXC services from WHMCS while keeping deep infrastructure control in Proxmox. It includes lifecycle automation, automated IPv4 pool allocation for cloud-init workflows, basic admin operations, server sync support, and a custom client area dashboard.
features: Automated IPv4 pool allocation for cloud-init workflows
WHMCS admin guest link repair and import support
Server sync integration for existing guests
